sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113240" key="xamaizumh/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμαι-ζῡμήτης</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρτος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> sine expl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ίτης</foreign>).</entryFree>
